title: Create: Clothes
description: PRIMARILY ADDS MILITARY UNIFORMS but has more stuff
body:
**This mod adds military uniforms with camo variants for every biome. Theres also more clothes like caps and crowns.**

### The mod is incomplete. Planned features include but are not limited to: Parachutes, Hit dodge chance full set bonus. And mainly better textures...

_If you are dissatisfied with the appearance of certain items, feel free to improve them and submit to me in Create Arsenal discord._

https://discord.gg/bZheYKBFbd
